findings_addressed.summary: D3 expanded HITL-locked source_type vocabulary from 6 to 7 values by admitting 'doc'.
findings_addressed.remediation: D3 rewritten: locked 6-value vocabulary {email, article, paper, meeting, note, todo} held unchanged. Writer coerces incoming kind='doc' (synthetic AC-013 fixture) to source_type='article'; canonical kind value is preserved verbatim in the kind metadata column. Mapping table + Rust helper + rationale + reject list updated. No HITL re-open required.

findings_addressed.summary: D4 migration relied on vec0 ALTER TABLE RENAME (unsupported in sqlite-vec 0.1.7) and invented an 'operational_mutations' schema stamp instead of using the real migration framework.
findings_addressed.remediation: D4 rewritten: migration uses migrate_with_event_sink(...) at src/rust/crates/fathomdb-engine/src/lib.rs:1238 gated by PRAGMA user_version. Schema rebuild is DROP TABLE + CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE under the same name (no rename). Repopulation reuses the existing Engine::rebuild_vec0 path (lib.rs:1947) which dispatches to rebuild_shadow_state with RebuildKind::Vec0 (lib.rs:2234-2289). Fabricated operational_mutations stamp removed. Cost baseline cites AC-013 562s seed time from dev/plans/runs/0.7.0-PERF-EXP-W4.1-ac013-canonical-output.json as an upper bound (rebuild skips embedder).

findings_addressed.summary: D6 secondary normalise([1,-1,1,-1,...]) fixture incorrectly claimed identical sign pattern to the half/half fixture.
findings_addressed.remediation: Secondary fixture deleted. Half/half popcount=384 fixture retained as the sole RED-test fixture. Optional defence-in-depth fixture documented (v[i] = +1.0 if i % 4 == 0 else -1.0, popcount = 192) with explicit, hand-computable popcount.

next_step_for_orchestrator: re-spawn codex reviewer for fix-1 verdict
